_README: AI Bill of Materials (AIBOM) template — a machine-readable inventory of every model, prompt, tool, plugin, connector, MCP server, library, dataset, and API in the agentic system, with version and provenance; replace every <placeholder> with real values, then delete this _README, _controls, _meta, and _guidance block so the committed aibom.json is a clean machine-readable inventory.
_controls: SUP-01 — Maintain AI bill of materials

_guidance._note: Delete this whole _guidance block once the AIBOM is filled in. It explains each section and how it backs the controls; it is not part of the evidence record.
_guidance.scope: List EVERY component the agent can load or call at runtime. An entry missing here is an untracked component (SUP-01 gap) and an unpinned/unverified supply-chain risk (SUP-02/SUP-04, risk AGT-12).

fields.version: A pinned identifier (semver tag, digest, or content hash) — never 'latest' or a floating tag (SUP-04).
fields.source: Where the component comes from: registry, repo path, or URL of record.
fields.provenance: The signature, attestation, or verification record proving authenticity and integrity (SUP-02). Reference the artifact, e.g. a cosign signature, SLSA attestation, or signed digest.
fields.approved: Boolean string: 'true' only if the component passed the documented approval/verification gate before deployment (SUP-02). Anything 'false' must not be deployed.
fields.risk: Component risk rating used to prioritize review, e.g. 'low' / 'medium' / 'high'.

_guidance.empty_arrays: Sections left as [] (plugins, connectors, mcpServers, datasets, apis) MUST be empty because the system genuinely has none — not because they were not checked. If a category exists, populate it.
_guidance.delete_before_evidence: Remove _README, _controls, _meta, and this _guidance object so the committed aibom.json is a clean machine-readable inventory.
